Class SidebarService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.scoreboard.services.SidebarService
public class SidebarService extends Object
Sub-service responsible for sidebar content.

Manages contributor registration and renders sidebar lines to each player's managed scoreboard. Scoreboard access is delegated to ScoreboardService.getScoreboard(java.util.UUID).

External plugins register contributors via registerContributor(SidebarContributor) and trigger immediate updates via refresh(Player). setup(Scoreboard), update(Scoreboard, Player), and clear() are called internally by ScoreboardService.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    clear()
    Clears all contributor state.
    static void
    configure(ScoreboardConfig scoreboardConfig)
    Applies the loaded configuration to the sidebar service.
    static void
    refresh(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
    Immediately refreshes the sidebar for a single player.
    static void
    registerContributor(SidebarContributor contributor)
    Registers a sidebar contributor.
    static void
    setup(org.bukkit.scoreboard.Scoreboard scoreboard)
    Sets up the sidebar objective and pre-allocated line slots on a new scoreboard.
    static void
    unregisterContributor(String id)
    Removes a contributor by ID and refreshes all online players.
    static void
    update(org.bukkit.scoreboard.Scoreboard scoreboard, org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
    Renders the current sidebar content for the given player onto their scoreboard.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • configure

      public static void configure(ScoreboardConfig scoreboardConfig)
      Applies the loaded configuration to the sidebar service. Called internally by ScoreboardService.init(JavaPlugin, ScoreboardConfig).
      Parameters:
      scoreboardConfig - the parsed scoreboard configuration

    • registerContributor

      public static void registerContributor(SidebarContributor contributor)
      Registers a sidebar contributor. Lower priority values appear higher.
      Parameters:
      contributor - the contributor to register
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if a contributor with the same ID or priority is already registered

    • unregisterContributor

      public static void unregisterContributor(String id)
      Removes a contributor by ID and refreshes all online players.
      Parameters:
      id - the contributor ID to remove

    • refresh

      public static void refresh(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Immediately refreshes the sidebar for a single player.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to refresh

    • setup

      public static void setup(org.bukkit.scoreboard.Scoreboard scoreboard)
      Sets up the sidebar objective and pre-allocated line slots on a new scoreboard. Called by ScoreboardService.onJoin(Player).
      Parameters:
      scoreboard - the player's newly created scoreboard

    • update

      public static void update(org.bukkit.scoreboard.Scoreboard scoreboard, org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Renders the current sidebar content for the given player onto their scoreboard. Called by ScoreboardService.refresh(Player) and ScoreboardService.refreshAll().
      Parameters:
      scoreboard - the player's managed scoreboard
      player - the player to render lines for

    • clear

      public static void clear()
      Clears all contributor state. Called by ScoreboardService.shutdown().
